item.title: A message from Mr. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a yearbook meeting this Friday at lunch in portable 316 for the design team.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron.
item.description: There will be a brief Europe Team meeting today at 10:40 in room 125. All travelers are asked to attend.

item.title: A message from Mr. Lafleur:
item.description: Congratulations to the Senior Boys Basketball Team for winning the AA Prescott-Russell Championship yesterday, defeating Escale by 30 points on our home floor. Special shoutout to our Grade 12 players, led by Tristan Bergeron with 20 points. They put on a great show for our Ravens in their last home game. The team will now compete in EOSSAA next Wednesday in Cornwall.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: There will be a mandatory ski/snowboard meeting today at 10:45 in room 125 for the following students Ben Berube, Brooklyn Ash,Cooper Boldt, Austin Lackey Diguer, Jaxon Irwin, Oliver Dawson,Jordan Pershick,Ceilib Williamson, Alexander Kerluke,Jack Findlay,Gavin Fader,Abby Weisgerber and Delilah Tessier

item.title: A message from Ms. Burnie, Mr. Warner, Mr. Brookes:
item.description: Tryouts for the grade 7 - 8 girls basketball team will be next Monday the 23rd and Wednesday the 25th from 2:25 to 4:00 pm

item.title: A message from the Main Office:
item.description: A reminder that tomorrow is a pre-paid Ravens' Wear day

item.title: A message from Ms. Clouthier:
item.description: There is a Grade 7 Boys basketball try-out today after school until 3:45 and a Grade 8 boys try-out tomorrow. Please wait outside of the gym until Ms. Clouthier arrives.
